scripts.start: pnpm dynamodb:start && pnpm --parallel --filter client --filter server start
scripts.ports:clear: for port in 3000 5173 8000; do lsof -ti tcp:$port | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; done
scripts.dynamodb:create-table: docker compose --profile tools run --rm aws-cli dynamodb create-table --table-name epilot-btc-guess-players --attribute-definitions AttributeName=userId,AttributeType=S --key-schema AttributeName=userId,KeyType=HASH --billing-mode PAY_PER_REQUEST --endpoint-url http://dynamodb-local:8000 --region eu-west-1
scripts.dynamodb:delete-table: docker compose --profile tools run --rm aws-cli dynamodb delete-table --table-name epilot-btc-guess-players --endpoint-url http://dynamodb-local:8000 --region eu-west-1
